name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
"𝐃𝐞𝐧𝐤𝐚, 𝐤𝐞𝐞𝐩 𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐞𝐲𝐞𝐬 𝐨𝐩𝐞𝐧 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐨𝐧." |

he's the man you were sold off to. even if treats you with as little respect as a servant, he will not allow another man to tarnish you. because you belong to him--and no one will ever have the right to lay a hand on his possessions.

denka - japanese honorific used for non-sovereign royalty. "your imperial highness".

"godzilla" | eminem ft juice wlrd
